recommendations.title: Tragedy Girls
recommendations.overview: McKayla and Sadie, two death-obsessed teenage girls, use their online show about real-life tragedies to send their small Midwestern town into a frenzy and cement their legacy as modern horror legends.

recommendations.title: The Whisperer in Darkness
recommendations.overview: Folklore professor Albert Wilmarth investigates legends of strange creatures in the most remote hills of Vermont. His enquiry reveals a terrifying glimpse of the truth that lurks behind the legends.

recommendations.title: Urban Legend
recommendations.overview: A college campus is plagued by a vicious serial killer murdering students in ways that correspond to various urban legends.

recommendations.title: Leprechaun: Origins
recommendations.overview: Two young couples backpacking through Ireland discover that one of Ireland's most famous legends is a terrifying reality.

recommendations.title: Sanam Teri Kasam
recommendations.overview: Tough ex-convict Inder and traditional mousy Saraswati fall in love and get married, but a tragedy changes their lives forever. The film is a modern rendition of the legends of Shiva-Sati and the novel "Love Story" by Eric Segal.

recommendations.title: House of 1000 Corpses
recommendations.overview: Two teenage couples traveling across the backwoods of Texas searching for urban legends of serial killers end up as prisoners of a bizarre and sadistic backwater family of serial killers.

recommendations.title: 10 Years
recommendations.overview: A group of friends reunite ten years after their high-school graduation.

recommendations.title: Next Door
recommendations.overview: After Ingrid leaves John, he allows himself to be pulled into a mystical and scary world where it is impossible to separate truth from lies.

recommendations.title: Nightbooks
recommendations.overview: Alex, a boy obsessed with scary stories, is trapped by a witch in her modern, magical New York City apartment. His original hair-raising tales are the only thing keeping him safe as he desperately tries to find a way out of this twisted place.

recommendations.title: Burning
recommendations.overview: For all who remember Cannonball Run. Here is a modern twist on the subject. The longest, wildest and funniest car race, ever. From Oslo to the North Cape. The only rule is getting there first!
